phases.name: Dominio Contacts
phases.description: Entidades Contact, Opportunity, PipelineStage, AdvisorAssignment, Enrollment — reglas de negocio R1-R4

phases.name: Casos de uso Contacts
phases.description: ContactUseCase (CRUD + dedup), OpportunityUseCase (pipeline), PipelineUseCase (etapas), AssignmentUseCase (round-robin), EnrollmentUseCase

phases.name: Controladores Contacts
phases.description: ContactController, OpportunityController, PipelineController con DTOs y Swagger

phases.name: Tests Contacts
phases.description: Tests unitarios y e2e para reglas de negocio de contactos y pipeline

architecture: Hexagonal. Contact = persona única deduplicada. Opportunity = pursuit comercial por Program/Cohort. Pipeline único de ~12 etapas. Asignación por AdvisorProgram con round-robin + row-lock. Enrollment manual auditado.
